text: Engine Starting Problems If the engine does not start or cranks slowly: Possible Causes: 1. Weak or dead battery 2. Faulty starter motor 3. Corroded battery terminals 4. Ignition switch issues 5. Fuel delivery problems Inspection Steps: - Check battery voltage (should be above 12.4V) - Inspect battery terminals for corrosion - Listen for clicking sound during ignition - Verify fuel pump operation - Check starter motor response
